resources.string: Discover free items in your neighborhood
Are you sure you want to logout?
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password
We sent an email with instructions to reset your password
By signing up, you agree to our
Your account has been created successfully!
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password.
As a registration bonus, you\'ve earned:
Choose how you want to add your profile photo
Password must be at least 6 characters
Password must contain at least one letter and one number
Nickname must be at least 3 characters
Nickname can only contain letters, numbers, dots, underscores and hyphens
First name must be at least 2 characters
First name can only contain letters and spaces
Last name must be at least 2 characters
Last name can only contain letters and spaces
City name must be at least 2 characters
Too many requests. Please try again later
Network error. Please check your internet connection
We need access to your camera to take photos
We need access to your location
Notifications are permanently denied. Open app settings to enable notifications.
Unlock all features and get the most out of SperrmüllFinder
Upgrade to Premium to unlock this feature and many more
Upgrade to Premium to unlock all features
Premium unlocked! Thank you so much for supporting us and we hope you enjoy all the premium features
Discover free items in your neighborhood
To show posts on the map, we need access to your location. This helps us find items near you.
Basic users are limited to 5 km radius. Upgrade to Premium to search up to 20 km and access advanced filters.
Category filtering and availability filters are Premium features. Upgrade to find exactly what you\'re looking for.
There are no posts in this area. Try expanding your search radius or checking a different location.
Try adjusting your filters or expanding your search area to find more posts.
There was a problem loading the map. Please check your internet connection and try again.
We couldn\'t access your location. You can still browse the map manually.
There was a problem loading posts. Please try again.
A new item was posted %1$s away in %2$s
New posts in your favorite area
Discover amazing free items in your neighborhood and give them a second life
Find furniture, electronics, books and more that others no longer need
Help your community by sharing items you no longer use
We need a few permissions to provide you with the best experience
Choose your city to find items near you
We need these permissions to provide you with the best experience
Find items near you and share your location when posting
Take photos of items you want to share with the community
Get notified about new items in your area and activity updates
Welcome back, %1$s! Check out what\'s new in your area.
Help the community by voting on whether this item is still there.
Share your first find with the community!
Start sharing your bulk waste finds to build your profile
Location permission is required to show nearby posts
GPS must be enabled to show your location
We need your location to show nearby posts and calculate distances.
Unable to load posts. Please check your internet connection and try again.
There are no posts in your area yet. Be the first to share something!
Try different search terms to find users
Start typing to search for users
Discover exactly what you\'re looking for with our powerful search and filtering tools.
Search through all posts without radius limitations
Filter by category, city, radius, and time range
Browse posts on the map without distance limits
Use exclusive map marker styles for premium users
Join thousands of users who found exactly what they needed with Premium search
Type in the search bar to find posts, users, and categories in your area.
We couldn\'t find anything matching \"%1$s\". Try different keywords or adjust your filters.
Unable to perform search. Please check your connection and try again.
Premium subscription required for this feature
I found this interesting item on SperrmüllFinder: %1$s\n\nDownload the app to see more: %2$s
Unable to load comments. Please try again.
Be the first to comment on this post!
Unable to load likes. Please try again.
Be the first to like this post!
When you share photos, they\'ll appear on your profile.
Your expired and archived posts will appear here.
Posts you favorite will appear here.
Join me on SperrmüllFinder! Download the app: [App Store Link]
Name must be at least 2 characters
Excellent! You are a trusted member.
Low. Pay attention to the quality of your posts.
Banned. You cannot create posts at this time.
Posting disabled due to low honesty
Enter a valid image URL or leave empty
Change name, city and profile picture
Warning: Your honesty score is low!
Posts older than 72 hours are automatically archived
Share your first bulk waste find with the community
Wenn dir Leute folgen, erscheinen sie hier
Wenn dir Leute folgen, erscheinen sie hier
Wenn du Leuten folgst, erscheinen sie hier
Wenn du Leuten folgst, erscheinen sie hier
Beginne zu tippen, um Nutzer zu suchen
Falls das Problem weiterhin besteht, starten Sie die App neu.
Google Play Services sind nicht installiert
Google Play Services müssen aktualisiert werden
Google Play Services Version ist ungültig
Take a photo and share it on the SperrmullFinder
Describe the item you are sharing…
Share what you found with the community
We need camera access to take photos of items
Camera permission denied. Please enable it in settings.
We need location access to show where items are
Location permission denied. Please enable it in settings.
Please take at least one photo
Please select at least one category
To take photos, we need access to your camera.
Camera permission is required to capture and share photos of bulk waste items.
Google Play Services error. Please update Google Play Services.
Authentication failed. Please restart the app.
Discover free items in your area
System is updating, please try again…
There was a problem loading posts
Found via SperrmüllFinder - Discover free items in your neighborhood!
Check out this item on SperrmüllFinder
Availability visible to Premium users only
Posts you favorite will appear here. Tap the bookmark icon on any post to add it to your favorites.
You can select up to 3 categories
Schau später wieder vorbei oder erweitere deinen Suchradius
Überprüfe deine Internetverbindung und versuche es erneut
Feed konnte nicht aktualisiert werden. Bitte versuche es erneut.
You\'ll see notifications here when you have them
To receive SperrmüllFinder alerts, please enable notifications.
Welcome to SperrmüllFinder Premium! Enjoy all benefits.
Your honesty score has been updated based on your activity.
You\'ll see notifications about likes, comments, and other activities here.
Posts you favorite will appear here
Are you sure you want to sign out of your account?
Discover free bulky-waste treasures near you and share your own finds with the community.
When someone likes or comments on your posts, you\'ll see it here
Failed to mark all as read
Please log in to like posts
Why are you reporting this comment?
Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
Try different search terms or expand your radius
Search is taking too long. Please try again.
When someone likes or comments on your posts, you\'ll see it here
A premium nearby post alert is available
A moderation update was sent to your account
You have a new system notification
Vielen Dank für Ihre Meldung. Wir werden sie so schnell wie möglich prüfen.
Diese Person wird Sie nicht mehr sehen können und Sie werden keine Inhalte von ihr sehen.
Diese Person kann Sie wieder sehen und Sie können deren Inhalte sehen.
Your account is currently restricted. You cannot access the app at this time.
Login blocked. Your account is restricted.
Sie haben 30 Tage Zeit, um diese Entscheidung zu widerrufen
Sie haben 30 Tage Zeit, um die Löschung zu widerrufen
Ihre Beiträge bleiben als \"Gelöschter Benutzer\" erhalten
Nach 30 Tagen werden alle Ihre Daten dauerhaft gelöscht
Bitte geben Sie einen Grund an (erforderlich)
Ihr Feedback ist wertvoll für uns…
Ihr Konto wird automatisch nach Ablauf der Frist gelöscht. Sie können die Löschung jederzeit abbrechen.
Warnung: Ihr Konto wird in weniger als 7 Tagen gelöscht!
Ihr Konto wird in 30 Tagen gelöscht. Sie können sich jederzeit wieder anmelden, um die Löschung zu widerrufen.
Dies ist eine ernste Angelegenheit. Ihr Konto wird in 30 Tagen dauerhaft gelöscht.
Möchten Sie diesen Beitrag wirklich löschen?
Diese Aktion kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden
Schalte exklusive Funktionen frei und erlebe das volle Potenzial
Mit dem Abonnement stimmst du den Nutzungsbedingungen und Datenschutzbestimmungen zu
Suche ohne Radius-Limit überall in deiner Stadt
Sehe neue Posts 10 Minuten vor anderen
Verdiene bis zu 20% mehr XP bei allen Aktionen
Zeige dein exklusives Premium-Abzeichen und Level-Rahmen
Sehe alle Details deiner archivierten Posts
Ihr Konto wird in Kürze dauerhaft gelöscht. Sie können dies jederzeit abbrechen.
You do not have permission to access the admin panel
Manage your subscription through Google Play Store. You can cancel or change your subscription at any time.
Payment pending. We will unlock Premium as soon as it is confirmed.
Selected product is not available right now.
RevenueCat could not load your published paywall. Details: %1$s
Change your active subscription or switch to another premium plan anytime.
You are already on the highest plan.
Click the button below to trigger your first journey via an in-app message.
Type a message below and tap Send to receive a push notification on this device.
OneSignal REST API key missing. Add ONESIGNAL_REST_API_KEY in local.properties.
